products.name: 15 Foot Square Steel Light Pole, 4 Inch Wide, 11 Gauge
products.short_desc: Product Specifications: Pole Top Options: A removable pole cap is provided if the pole is drilled for attaching light fixtures. The drill pattern and drill orientation needs to be provided by the customer unless Energy Light fixtures are used for the project. If tenon option is selected, a steel tenon will be provided. A 2 3⁄8 inch diameter tenon with 4 inch length is standard; however, the customer needs to confirm the appropriate tenon size required for the project. Pole Shaft: 4 inch square 11 gauge. Pole shaft is weldable-grade, cold-rolled, commercial quality carbon steel tubing conforming to ASTM A500 Grade B. All welds conform to AWS D1.2 using ER70S-6 electrodes. Handhole: Reinforced, 3” X 5” size handhole is located at 18 inches from the base. Grounding lug incorporating a tapped 1/2″-13 NC hole is provided. Color : Commercial grade, super durable powder coat is the standard option. Dark bronze, white and black colors are provided at no extra charge. Other colors and custom colors options are available at a surcharge. Hot dip galvanizing is available with a surcharge and extended lead time. Powder coated, galvanized poles are also available as a premium option. Anchor Bolts: A set of 4 galvanized steel anchor bolts specifically designed for this light pole is required for each pole assembly. Each anchor bolt includes 2 nuts and 2 washers. The top portion of the anchor bolt is threaded for securing and leveling the pole with the provided nuts and washers. An actual size paper anchor bolt template is provided. Bolt Circle: 8-1/2″ (Bolt Circle Range 8″-11″) Base Cover: Two-piece steel square base cover is required for protecting pole base from elements. Stainless steel screws are included to attach the 2 pieces together after pole installation. Other Options: The following options are available: Vibration dampener, custom tenon sizes, custom colors, electric/GFI outlets, custom pole heights, additional handholes, UL compliant handholes and custom base plate dimensions. Warranty: 1 Year. Foundation Design: Foundation should be designed by an engineer familiar with local soil and wind conditions as well as local code where the pole(s) will be installed.

pages.title: Privacy Policy
pages.content: ZION LED USA (“we,” “our,” or “us”) respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information. 1. Information We Collect When you submit a form on our website or through our advertisements, we may collect: Full Name Email Address Phone Number Company Name (if provided) ZIP Code or Location Project Details 2. How We Use Your Information We use the information you provide to: Respond to your inquiries Provide project quotations and pricing Discuss commercial LED lighting solutions Follow up regarding your project requirements We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. 3. Information Sharing Your information may be shared only with authorized team members or service providers necessary to respond to your inquiry. 4. Data Security We take reasonable measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, disclosure, or misuse. 5. Third-Party Platforms If you submit your information through platforms such as Facebook or Google, your information may also be subject to their respective privacy policies. 6. Contact Us If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: ZION LED USA Email: contact@zionledusa.com Phone: 642-006-0756

pages.title: About Us
pages.content: Your One Stop Destination For Brilliant Lighting. Delivering high-quality lighting solutions for Residential, Office, and Commercial environments — built to perform and made to last. At ZION LED USA, We didn’t step into the market just to sell — We came to serve. Born in a challenging era, We stood strong with one belief: “Serve First” — with Unbeatable Quality, Honest Pricing, and Unmatched Support. Every product we deliver reflects our hard work, dedication, and zero-compromise attitude. We don’t chase trends – We set the standard in LED lighting through: ⚡ High Performance & Durability 💰 Value-Driven Low Pricing 🤝 Loyal Customer Relationships 🚚 Reliable Supply & Service Consistency ZION LED USA isn’t just another lighting brand – We’re here to Serve with Purpose , Deliver with Quality , and Earn Trust with every light we ship – No compromise. All value. That’s ZION LED .
